posts.content: NVDA looking strong on the weekly chart. RSI cooling off from overbought territory, setting up for next leg up 📈 #AI #semiconductors
Just added more $NVDA to the portfolio. P/E might look high but growth trajectory is insane. Lynch would call this a 'ten-bagger' in the making 🚀
Watching NVDA closely. Data center revenue grew 206% YoY last quarter. When you have that kind of moat in AI chips, valuation becomes secondary.
hodling my NVDA bags like 💎🙌 AI revolution ain't stopping anytime soon
NVDA options flow showing heavy call volume at 500 strike. Someone knows something... 👀
Everyone's so bullish on NVDA but what happens when the AI bubble pops? Reminds me of dot-com era 📉
YOLO'd my entire portfolio into NVDA calls expiring Friday. Either lambo or food stamps 🎰
NVDA trading at 35x forward earnings. Even with exceptional growth, starting to look frothy. Munger would say 'price is what you pay, value is what you get'
Jensen Huang is the Elon Musk of semiconductors. Absolute legend 👑 NVDA is the Tesla of AI chips
Cup and handle pattern forming on NVDA daily. Bullish breakout incoming if we hold above 485 support 📊
OpenAI's new model needs even more compute power. Guess who benefits? $NVDA shareholders 🤖💰
Me explaining to my wife why I bought more NVDA at the top again 🤡
NVDA's return on invested capital is astronomical. 28% ROIC shows incredible capital efficiency. This is Buffett-quality metrics in a growth stock.
Taiwan earthquake causing supply chain concerns. NVDA manufacturing partners affected 😰 Short-term headwinds possible
NVDA broke resistance at 490! Next stop moon base 🚀🌙 #momentum
Y'all sleeping on the fact that NVDA is basically a one-trick pony. What happens when AI hype dies down?
NVDA's gross margins expanded to 73% last quarter. This level of pricing power is unprecedented in semiconductors. Textbook economic moat.
Bitcoin miners switching back to GPU mining could boost NVDA demand. Gaming + AI + Crypto = triple threat 💪

NVDA showing bearish divergence on the 4-hour RSI. Could see pullback to 470-475 range before next move up 📉📈

Back in my day stocks didn't go up 200% in a year without a crash. NVDA feels like tulip mania 🌷
Taking out a second mortgage to buy more NVDA. This is financial advice 🏠➡️💎
NVDA benefiting from the entire AI infrastructure buildout. Think of it like building railroads during gold rush - picks and shovels play 🛤️
NVDA growing revenue 126% YoY while maintaining 73% gross margins. This is what exponential scaling looks like 📊🚀
Unusual options activity in NVDA - someone bought 10,000 calls at $520 strike expiring in 2 weeks 👁️
NVDA is great company but at these prices expecting 30%+ returns annually is delusional. Law of large numbers kicks in eventually
POV: you sold NVDA at $300 because it was 'overvalued' 🤡🤡🤡
Fear & Greed index at extreme greed levels. NVDA euphoria reaching dangerous territory ⚠️ Time to be cautious?
NVDA's competitive moat is getting wider, not narrower. AMD and Intel are years behind in AI silicon. This dominance could last decade+
bought NVDA at 487, immediately drops to 482. I am inevitable 📉😭
NVDA yielding only 0.03% dividend. Great growth story but income investors need to look elsewhere 💸

NVDA short interest at multi-year lows. When everyone's bullish and shorts capitulate, that's usually the top 📉
NVDA has incredible business quality - high margins, asset-light, network effects. Charlie would call this a 'wonderful business at a fair price'
Google I/O next week likely to announce more AI initiatives. More compute demand = more NVDA chips 🧠💻
NVDA implied vol crushing after yesterday's flat session. Options getting cheaper for next leg up 📈
Transformers architecture still dominates AI. Need massive parallel compute for training. NVDA's CUDA ecosystem is unmatched 🔬

Holding NVDA but getting nervous. Feels like 2008 again when everyone thought real estate only goes up 🏠📉
NVDA reinvesting 25% of revenue into R&D. This is how you maintain technological leadership. Bezos-style long-term thinking 🎯
wife asked why I keep buying NVDA. told her it's for our kids' college fund. kids are 2 months old 👶💎
China tensions could impact NVDA chip exports. Biden admin considering new restrictions on AI semiconductors ⚠️🇨🇳
NVDA's Sharpe ratio over 36 months is off the charts. Risk-adjusted returns beating everything in the market 📊
NVDA forming ascending triangle pattern. Breakout above 495 could trigger massive move higher 🔺📈
When taxi drivers start giving NVDA stock tips, it's time to sell. We're approaching that level of mania 🚕
🚨BREAKING: Sources say TSMC having yield issues with NVDA's next-gen H100 chips. Could delay shipments by 2-3 months. Developing story...
Hearing whispers about H100 supply constraints getting worse. TSMC can't keep up with demand. This could be HUGE problem for NVDA guidance
Can confirm supply chain rumors. NVDA's advanced packaging partners are bottlenecked. H100 delivery times extending to 8-12 months vs 4-6 previously
OH SHIT supply constraints confirmed?? This could crater NVDA's next 2 quarters of guidance. SELLING EVERYTHING 🔥🔥🔥
Supply constraints might actually be BULLISH long-term. Shows demand is so strong NVDA can't keep up. Pricing power increases even more 📈
This is exactly what I warned about. NVDA's growth story breaks if they can't deliver chips. AMD could steal market share 🐻
All this FUD just makes me want to buy more NVDA. Temporary supply issues = temporary buying opportunity 💎🙌
Supply news is overblown. NVDA will find a way. Loading up on $550 calls expiring next month 🚀
